meta.summary: Adapter, primer, quality, poly-A trimming and demultiplexing for high-throughput sequencing reads.
meta.description: Adapter, primer, quality, poly-A trimming and demultiplexing for high-throughput sequencing reads.

test: test "$(cutadapt --version)" = '5.2' && python -m cutadapt --version | grep -Fx '5.2' >/dev/null && cutadapt --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Cutadapt removes adapter sequences' >/dev/null && python -c 'import cutadapt, dnaio, xopen, isal, zlib_ng, zstandard; assert cutadapt.__version__ == "5.2"' && grep -F 'commit=ef852629f667637439f28761499bb56126e390a1' /opt/cutadapt/share/doc/cutadapt/source.txt >/dev/null && find /opt/cutadapt/venv -type f -name '*.so' -print0 | xargs -0 -r ldd > /tmp/taf-cutadapt-ldd.txt && grep -F 'libc.so' /tmp/taf-cutadapt-ldd.txt >/dev/null && ! grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-cutadapt-ldd.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cutadapt-single && cd /tmp/taf-cutadapt-single && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && cutadapt -a AGATCGGAAGAGC -m 5 -o trimmed.fq --json report.cutadapt.json reads.fq > run.log 2>&1 && test -s trimmed.fq && grep -F 'ACGTACGT' trimmed.fq >/dev/null && ! grep -F 'AGATCGGA' trimmed.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'Total reads processed:' run.log >/dev/null && grep -F 'read_counts' report.cutadapt.json >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cutadapt-paired && cd /tmp/taf-cutadapt-paired && printf '@r1/1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r1.fq && printf '@r1/2
TGCATGCAAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > r2.fq && cutadapt --cores=2 -a AGATCGGAAGAGC -A AGATCGGAAGAGC -m 5 -o out.1.fq -p out.2.fq r1.fq r2.fq > run.log 2>&1 && test -s out.1.fq && test -s out.2.fq && grep -F 'ACGTACGT' out.1.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'TGCATGCA' out.2.fq >/dev/null && grep -F 'Total read pairs processed:' run.log >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cutadapt-compress && cd /tmp/taf-cutadapt-compress && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTAGATCGGAAGAGC
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fq.gz && cutadapt -a AGATCGGAAGAGC -o out.fq.gz reads.fq.gz > gz.log 2>&1 && gzip -cd out.fq.gz | grep -F 'ACGTACGT' >/dev/null && bzip2 -c reads.fq > reads.fq.bz2 && cutadapt -a AGATCGGAAGAGC -o out.fq.bz2 reads.fq.bz2 > bz2.log 2>&1 && bzip2 -cd out.fq.bz2 | grep -F 'ACGTACGT' >/dev/null && xz -c reads.fq > reads.fq.xz && cutadapt -a AGATCGGAAGAGC -o out.fq.xz reads.fq.xz > xz.log 2>&1 && xz -cd out.fq.xz | grep -F 'ACGTACGT' >/dev/null && zstd -q -c reads.fq > reads.fq.zst && cutadapt --cores=2 -a AGATCGGAAGAGC -o out.fq.zst reads.fq.zst > zst.log 2>&1 && zstd -q -dc out.fq.zst | grep -F 'ACGTACGT' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cutadapt-demux && cd /tmp/taf-cutadapt-demux && printf '@r1
AAATTTT
+
FFFFFFF
@r2
CCCGGGG
+
FFFFFFF
@r3
GGGGGGG
+
FFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && cutadapt -g sampleA=^AAA -g sampleC=^CCC --action=none -o 'demux-{name}.fq' --untrimmed-output demux-unknown.fq reads.fq > run.log 2>&1 && test -s demux-sampleA.fq && test -s demux-sampleC.fq && test -s demux-unknown.fq && grep -F '@r1' demux-sampleA.fq >/dev/null && grep -F '@r2' demux-sampleC.fq >/dev/null && grep -F '@r3' demux-unknown.fq >/dev/null

upstream.name: Cutadapt
upstream.citation: Martin 2011, Cutadapt removes adapter sequences from high-throughput sequencing reads
